info.name: Heart Disease Prediction API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Heart Disease Prediction Backend.

## Quick Start Order
1. **Auth → Register - Youssef Amr** (token auto-saved)
2. **Auth → Register - Omar Ahmed**
3. **Auth → Login - Youssef Amr** (refreshes token)
4. **Labs → Create** all 6 labs in order (IDs auto-saved)
5. **Lab Tests → Youssef's Tests → Create** all 5
6. **Lab Tests → Omar's Tests → Create** all 5
7. **Hospitals → Create** all 6 hospitals

**Base URL:** `http://localhost:5000`

exec: console.log('✅ Al Mokhtabar Lab ID:', json.data.id);

console.log('✅ Al Shams Lab ID:', json.data.id);
console.log('✅ Al Nile Lab ID:', json.data.id);
